---
title: "Final Ananlysis"
author: "Nabin , NAVA"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## Schedule Extraction and matching
```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(cfbfastR)
library(tidyverse)
```
### We pulled schedule data from espn_cfb_schedule function
```{r}
years =c(2000:2005)
data_func <- function(years) {
    espn_cfb_schedule(year = years)
}
schedule<- map_dfr(years, data_func)
```

### Importing our Csv mapping file
```{r}
colleges <- read_csv("colleges.csv")
```

### Filtering out the schedule for our 26 teams
```{r}
Final_filtered_schedule<-schedule%>%filter(home_team_full %in% college$NCAA_Team | away_team_full %in% college$NCAA_Team)
Final_filtered_schedule%>%select(matchup,season,game_date,home_team_full,home_team_name,away_team_full,away_team_name,home_win,away_win)
names(Final_filtered_schedule)
```
